button.tidy.sort.tooltip: Sort only the open container contents.
button.tidy.sort_default.tooltip: Default sort for the current inventory area.
button.tidy.sort_columns.tooltip: Sort the current inventory area into columns.
button.tidy.sort_rows.tooltip: Sort the current inventory area into rows.
message.tidy.elytra_no_replacement: Elytra is about to break and there is no replacement in your inventory!
tooltip.tidy.sort_mode: Choose the algorithm used when sorting player inventory or container contents.
tooltip.tidy.lock_hotbar: Keep hotbar slots untouched when sorting your player inventory.
tooltip.tidy.auto_refill: Swap in a replacement tool or weapon when the current one breaks or gets too close to breaking.
tooltip.tidy.refill_blocks: Refill stackable blocks and consumables when the selected hotbar stack runs out.
tooltip.tidy.low_durability_refill: Replace damageable gear before it fully breaks based on the configured threshold.
tooltip.tidy.low_durability_threshold: Number of durability points left before Tidy tries to swap in a better replacement.
tooltip.tidy.elytra_warning: Play a warning sound and show an actionbar message when Elytra is close to breaking and there is no spare one.
tooltip.tidy.middle_click_sort: Middle-click a slot in a handled screen to sort the relevant inventory area.
tooltip.tidy.container_buttons: Enable or disable the side icon buttons entirely.
tooltip.tidy.locked_slot_toggle: Use the slot lock keybind while hovering to toggle it.
message.tidy.quick_move_blocked: Shift-click from containers is blocked while locked slots are active.
message.tidy.button_layout_instructions: Drag each button directly on the real preview to place it exactly where you want it.
message.tidy.button_layout_hint: Use the tabs to edit separate layouts for player inventory, single storage, and double storage screens.
message.tidy.button_layout_empty: Enable at least one relevant button to preview this layout.
message.tidy.button_layout_master_off: GUI buttons are currently disabled globally. This editor still previews their position.
tooltip.tidy.player_sort_button: Show the Z / || / = sort buttons on the player inventory screen.
tooltip.tidy.storage_sort_button: Show the Z / || / = sort buttons on supported container screens.
tooltip.tidy.config_button: Show the button that opens Tidy settings.
tooltip.tidy.button_scale: Scale the side buttons as a percentage of the default size.
tooltip.tidy.refill_offhand_totems: After a totem is consumed, try to move another one into the offhand while respecting locked slots.
